name: Imagen 4 Fast
capabilities: Fast Text-to-Image Generation: Optimized for speed with good quality
Text Rendering: Enhanced typography for posters, comics, and slides
Multiple Formats: PNG, JPEG, WebP output formats
Prompt Enhancement: LLM-based prompt rewriting for better quality

rate_limits.default: Variable based on Gemini API limits

features.fast_generation: Optimized for speed while maintaining good quality

best_practices: Use when generation speed is more important than maximum quality
Ideal for rapid prototyping and iterative design workflows
Good for batch generation tasks where throughput matters
Consider Imagen 4 or Imagen 4 Ultra for highest quality requirements
examples: generate_image(prompt='A colorful sunset over a mountain lake', model='imagen-4-fast', size='1536x1024')
generate_image(prompt='Simple product photo of a coffee mug on white background', model='imagen-4-fast')
